report.summary: Audited 2 new learn pages (ERC-8183, Crypto Retirement IRA) and funding-rate-tracker for UX issues; fixed 2 broken internal links, added responsive typography and mobile breakpoints, improved touch targets to 44px minimum, created 2 branded OG images (1200x630 SVG), and updated OG meta references from dynamic API to static assets.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed 2 broken internal links on ERC-8183 page: /learn/virtuals-protocol-guide → /learn/ai-crypto-agents-guide, /learn/ethereum-foundation-ai-research → /learn/ai-agent-identity-nhi-guide
Added responsive CSS media queries (@media max-width: 768px) to both new learn pages for mobile-friendly layout
Converted h1 font sizing from fixed 42px to clamp(28px, 5vw, 42px) for fluid responsive typography on both pages
Increased Table of Contents link touch targets from ~32px to 44px minimum height (minHeight: 44px) on both pages for mobile accessibility
Bumped TOC link font size from 14px to 15px for improved readability
Added mobile breakpoint overrides for container padding (40px 20px → 24px 16px on mobile)
Added mobile single-column override for related articles grid on both pages

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: erc-8183-agentic-commerce-guide (1200x630 SVG) — features agent network decoration, job lifecycle diagram (Open→Funded→Submitted→Terminal), degen0x brand gradient, LEARN badge
OG image: crypto-retirement-ira-pension-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — features growth curve chart, key stats cards ($7K IRA / $23.5K 401k / 5+ providers), INVESTING badge, degen0x brand styling

sections.title: Meta & SEO Updates
items: Updated ERC-8183 page OpenGraph and Twitter image URLs from dynamic /api/og to static /og-erc-8183-agentic-commerce-guide.svg
Updated Crypto Retirement page OpenGraph and Twitter image URLs from dynamic /api/og to static /og-crypto-retirement-ira-pension-guide-2026.svg
Updated Article structured data image references on both pages to match new static OG assets

sections.title: Audit Findings (No Action Required)
items: Both pages correctly include Breadcrumb, BackToTop, and StructuredData components
FAQ structured data schemas properly generated with generateFAQSchema()
Tables wrapped in overflowX: auto for mobile horizontal scrolling
Focus styles present on TOC links and related cards (2px solid #6366f1)
Funding Rate Tracker tool page uses proper CSS variables and responsive grid pattern
